name: Caisse Regionale de Credit Agricole Mutuel Nord de France Societe cooperative
summary: Caisse R竏堙可ｬﾂｩgionale de Cr竏堙可ｬﾂｩdit Agricole Mutuel Nord de France Soci竏堙可ｬﾂｩt竏堙可ｬﾂｩ coop竏堙可ｬﾂｩrative operates as a regional bank in France.
